source_policy: Original starter quests authored for the SW_MMO prototype (overnight C2). Clone Wars-era, 20 BBY Mos Eisley framing; not ported from any read-only source. Objective kinds + reward shape match scripts/rules/quest_model.gd; rewards reuse the economy (credits) + dual-track CP (gameplay). Tunable content, not owner-gated balance.

quests.name: Pest Control
quests.description: The Dune Sea crawls with vermin. Cull three of the beasts prowling the lawless wastes.

quests.name: Into the Dune Sea
quests.description: Scout the lawless Dune Sea beyond the spaceport perimeter. Watch your back out there.

quests.name: Make Your Way
quests.description: Every spacer needs credits. Earn 200 in the field and prove you can hustle on Tatooine.

quests.name: Krayt Bounty
quests.description: A monstrous krayt has been raiding the wastes. The Hutts will pay well for its skull.
